indicators.name: several couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for computer work as they lack a flat surface and are designed for lounging.

indicators.name: low ceiling height
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling height can lead to discomfort and limited headroom for tall individuals.

indicators.name: lack of windows
indicators.rationale: No natural light sources, which can be beneficial for some tasks.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: No desk or table at sitting height is present, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting may cause screen glare and is not suitable for focused work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While there are several couches, the lack of a flat personal work surface, low ceiling height, and ambient lighting make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. The absence of windows also limits natural light availability, which can be detrimental for some tasks.
